$schema_note: Podcast Production Engine (Skill 58) STATIC unit price table (furnace-design Guardrail 3). Call sites meter UNITS (LLM input/output tokens, web-research calls, Kie.ai images, Fish Audio UTF-8 bytes); podcast-cost-ledger.py reads THIS file to convert those units to dollars and enforce the ceilings in furnace.json. Prices drifting NEVER requires a code change: the operator restamps this table. All prices are current-as-of pinned_at best estimates for the shipped routing set and are per-client overridable. LLM token prices are per 1,000,000 tokens. Fish Audio is priced per UTF-8 byte (15 dollars per 1,000,000 bytes, roughly 60 cents per 30-minute episode). Zero em dashes.

ollama/kimi-k2.6:cloud.note: Ollama Cloud amortized-nominal for Kimi 2.6; mirrors the OpenRouter list price for ceiling safety.

openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.note: OpenRouter list price for Kimi 2.6; restamp from openrouter.ai/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6.

openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2.note: OpenRouter list price for GLM 5.2; restamp from openrouter.ai/z-ai/glm-5.2.

gemini-3.1-flash-lite.note: Final fallback and qc_judge tier; cheapest content model.

kie.ai/gpt-image-2.note: One 1024 square cover per episode. Kie.ai GPT-image-2; a smoke image runs roughly 0.04 to 0.10 dollars. Restamp from current Kie.ai pricing.

fish-audio/s2.1-pro.note: Model s2.1-pro via header, client reference_id. Roughly 14,000 bytes for a 10-minute episode (about 0.21 dollars); roughly 42,000 bytes for a 30-minute episode (about 0.63 dollars). The free tier s2.1-pro-free is FORBIDDEN for client content and is never priced or used here.

default.note: Perplexity sonar or the best available web-research tool; metered per call and capped at web_research_calls_per_episode (12) in furnace.json. Restamp per the wired tool.

healthy_episode_reference.note: A healthy 10-minute episode meters well under the 1.50 dollar soft-warn target: roughly 14,000 TTS bytes, one 1K image, one research pass, one write cycle. These ceilings only trip on runaway loops, which is exactly their job.
